heading: Plan Your Perfect Day Trip from Nairobi
paragraphs: I've spent years exploring places around Nairobi, and one thing I've learned is that the best day trips from Nairobi don't require long hours on the road. The real gems are the destinations you can reach within one to two hours of the city and still have plenty of time to explore, relax, and make it back before dark.

Whether you're looking for wildlife, tea farms, waterfalls, hiking trails, or a quiet countryside escape, there are plenty of amazing places to visit outside Nairobi. My personal favourites include Nairobi National Park, the Giraffe Centre, the Elephant Orphanage, and the beautiful tea plantations of Tigoni.
This guide is a collection of the day trips I genuinely recommend for anyone looking for things to do in Nairobi for a day or planning the perfect Nairobi weekend getaway.
